overview.summary: pnpm monorepo with four packages: web (React SPA), api (Fastify server), ml (Python ML service), and shared (common types/utilities). Deployed on AWS ECS Fargate with PostgreSQL, Redis, and BullMQ.

rootStructure.description: pnpm monorepo with 4 packages: web (React SPA), api (Fastify server), ml (Python ML service), and shared (common types/utilities)

entries.description: React 19 SPA — main frontend application with Vite build
Fastify 5 REST API — core backend with PostgreSQL and Redis
Python ML service — AI prioritization engine with FastAPI and gRPC
Shared TypeScript types, Zod schemas, and utility functions
Docker configurations for all services and docker-compose files

structure.description: Shared UI components (TaskCard, PriorityBadge, FocusModePanel, etc.)
Page-level route components (Dashboard, Settings, Integrations)
Custom React hooks (useTaskPriority, useFocusMode, useIntegration)
Zustand stores (taskStore, userStore, focusStore)
TanStack Query hooks and API client functions
Tailwind config and global CSS with TFDS design tokens
Utility functions (formatters, validators, date helpers)
Component and integration tests
API route handlers organized by domain (auth, tasks, projects, focus, integrations)
Business logic services (TaskService, PriorityService, IntegrationService)
Drizzle ORM schema definitions and migrations
Fastify plugins (auth, rate-limiting, validation, error-handling)
BullMQ job definitions and processors
gRPC client for ML service communication
API integration tests with supertest
ML model definitions and training scripts
Inference server with gRPC endpoints
Feature engineering pipelines for task data
Model evaluation scripts and metrics
Training data, model checkpoints, and evaluation results
Unit and integration tests with pytest
TypeScript type definitions shared across web and api
Zod validation schemas for API payloads
Shared constants (status enums, priority ranges, integration providers)
Shared utility functions (date formatting, ID generation)

keyFiles.description: Task CRUD API routes — the most heavily used endpoints
Orchestrates AI priority scoring by calling ML service via gRPC and caching results in Redis
Primary task display component used throughout the application
Focus Mode page component with session management and timer
Core AI model inference logic for priority scoring
Zod schema for task validation — used by both web and api packages
